Table.name: SGNFCNT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CNTNGNT_ENCMBRNC
Table.commentInRDBMS: Contingent encumbrance refers to the additional assets which may need to be encumbered when the reporting institutions faces adverse developments triggered by an external event over which the reporting institution has no control (including a downgrade, decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets or a general loss of confidence). In these cases, the reporting institution will need to encumber additional assets as a consequence of already existing transactions. The additional amount of encumbered assets shall be net of the impact of the institution’s hedge transactions against the events described under the aforementioned stressed scenarios. (Annext 17 (Asset Encumbrance) 4. Part C)

Column.name: DT_RFRNC
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: SGNFCNT_CRRNCY
Column.comment: Significant currency is that currency that the reporting agent has deemed significant for the purpose of reporting Asset Encubrance Contingent scenario 'Significant currency depreciation'. It contains the currency code according to ISO4217.

Column.name: CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CNTRL_BNKS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreement liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreement liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_ASST_BCKD_SCRTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued as asset-backed securities issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued as asset-backed securities liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CVRD_BNDS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued as covered bonds issued 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Debt securities issued as covered bond Debt securities issued as covered bonds issued liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: DPSTS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Deposits 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate deposit liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: DRVTVS_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Derivatives 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate derivative liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: OTC_DRVTV_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivative liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: OTHR_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Other sources of encumbrance 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities that are other sources of encumbrance amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CNTRL_BNK_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Repurchase agreements with central banks 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate Repurchase agreements with central bank liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Repurchase agreements 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate repurchase agreements liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: SLCTD_FNNCL_LBLT_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Selected financial liablities 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.

Column.name: TTL_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_CRRNCY_DPRCTN_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Total sources of encumbrance 10% currency depreciation carrying amount in Scenario B is a simulation of a 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution’s total liabilities.
